opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes feel like they're full of broken glass, my mouth is so dry I can't swallow, and my whole body aches.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My Sjogren's has flared badly over two days — my eyes burn, I can't swallow solids for lack of saliva, and I'm exhausted; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: burning 'broken glass' eyes, bone-dry mouth, and diffuse joint aches
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: eyes are agony in light; I can't eat solids
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both eyes, whole mouth, and both hands and knees ache
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a flare of my known Sjogren's
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: eye drops and sipping water help briefly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound fatigue; both eyes equally affected; no sudden vision loss
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have primary Sjogren's and get sicca flares, but this is severe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: primary Sjogren's syndrome (dry eyes/mouth, joint aches)

family_history_as_reported.narrative: some autoimmune disease in the family

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can't eat solids or keep my eyes comfortable

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the sicca and joint symptoms clearly; keeps eyes closed

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes are red and burning equally; no pus, and my vision is blurry from dryness but not suddenly lost
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual self-report; not a slit-lamp examination

objective_data_offered.value: my mouth is parched and I can't swallow solids, but I can sip and swallow water
